entity.summary: Sui- and Aptos-based decentralized exchange and concentrated-liquidity protocol that launched on Sui mainnet on May 3, 2023. Cetus suffered a major exploit in May 2025, temporarily halted trading, and completed a full protocol relaunch in June 2025 before continuing active operation.
entity.notes: The canonical launch marker uses Cetus's first-day Sui mainnet operation on 2023-05-03. Existing May 2025 exploit, halt, and June 2025 relaunch events are not duplicated in this bundle. Current first-party pages confirm active swap, liquidity, launchpad, and developer services.

expected.summary: Sui- and Aptos-based decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol. In May 2025 it suffered a very large exploit that halted trading and paused smart contracts, but it restarted in June 2025 after a recovery plan, frozen-fund transfer, and Sui Foundation support.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. The May 2025 exploit was severe and temporarily halted trading, but the protocol relaunched in June 2025. HEI records it as active with critical exploit, trading halt, and restart events.

changes.summary: Sui- and Aptos-based decentralized exchange and concentrated-liquidity protocol that launched on Sui mainnet on May 3, 2023. Cetus suffered a major exploit in May 2025, temporarily halted trading, and completed a full protocol relaunch in June 2025 before continuing active operation.
changes.notes: The canonical launch marker uses Cetus's first-day Sui mainnet operation on 2023-05-03. Existing May 2025 exploit, halt, and June 2025 relaunch events are not duplicated in this bundle. Current first-party pages confirm active swap, liquidity, launchpad, and developer services.

events.title: Cetus launched on Sui mainnet
events.description: Cetus went live on the first day of the Sui mainnet launch on May 3, 2023, becoming the first decentralized exchange and concentrated-liquidity protocol operating on Sui mainnet.
events.notes: The event is the Sui mainnet launch marker; Cetus had earlier development and Aptos activity.

evidence.title: Cetus Report | Q2 & July, 2023
evidence.notes: First-party report states that Sui mainnet launched on May 3 and Cetus went live from day one.

evidence.title: Cetus Launching Partners on Sui
evidence.notes: First-party article confirms Cetus was live on day one of Sui mainnet.

evidence.title: Cetus official protocol site
evidence.notes: Current official site exposes active trading, liquidity, launch, documentation, and developer interfaces.
